description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in DFD Cart 1.1.4 and earlier, when register_globals is enabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the set_depth parameter to (1) app.lib/product.control/core.php/product.control.config.php, or (2) customer.browse.list.php or (3) customer.browse.search.php in app.lib/product.control/core.php/customer.area/.
